Modernizing Data Practices to Improve Government Act
legislation_refs.context: This Act may be cited as the "Modernizing Data Practices to Improve Government Act".

legislation_refs.context: artificial systems and techniques described in paragraphs (1) through (5) of section 238(g) of the John S. McCain National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2019

named_docs.name: Modernizing Data Practices to Improve Government Act
named_docs.context: Bill to amend title 44, United States Code, to modernize data practices to improve government

named_docs.name: biennial reports on AI use and data governance improvements
named_docs.context: Mandates biennial reports on AI use and data governance improvements in agencies

named_docs.name: Chief Data Officer Inventory
named_docs.context: The Director, in consultation with the Council, shall make available on a public website an inventory of Chief Data Officers

named_docs.name: biennial report on the work of the Council
named_docs.context: Not later than 2 years after the date of the enactment, and every two years thereafter, a report on the work of the Council

named_docs.name: report on recommendations and best practices for agencies
named_docs.context: Not later than 1 year after the date of the enactment, a report that includes recommendations and best practices for agencies

named_docs.name: Comptroller General evaluation report
named_docs.context: the Comptroller General shall submit to Congress a report on whether the duties of the Council improved the use of evidence, data, and program evaluation

disambiguation_rules.director: Refers to the Director of the Office of Management and Budget, based on context of title 44 governance and authority to issue guidance to agencies

oddities.note: Section 3 contains only a fiscal constraint statement with no new entity mentions. This is a standard appropriations restriction clause found in legislative acts.
